events.title: Fix audio error 6 in MyMeeting
events.summary: The user resolved AudioError error 6 in MyMeeting by identifying that zero segments ('0段') were incorrectly treated as fatal. They added explicit error cases like 'noSpeechDetected' and 'noAudioFile', implemented LocalizedError for user-friendly messages, and updated RetranscriptionService and AudioChunk.swift to handle music and non-speech audio correctly.

events.title: Retrain speaker models and fix UI
events.summary: The user retrained speaker models using 'enrollByRecording' and 'enrollByFile' with audio files like 'Personal ai meeting 1.m4a' and '声音训练素材'. They also fixed UI issues in Divider() components across multiple views, replacing hardcoded Color.white with Color.primary for visibility in light mode, and addressed a sensitivity bug in the 'history' button.

events.title: Deploy and test ASR models
events.summary: The user committed and deployed code changes, tested Chinese ASR models including Qwen3-ASR (MLX) and Chinese ERes2NetV2, and verified re-transcription with the Energy (RMS) segmenter. They also adjusted cron job logic to support broader triggers like 'every day' and handled model evaluation via options 1–3.

events.title: Manage OCR and scheduler config
events.summary: The user ported OCR logic to Swift, addressed message retention in AxCleanup, and considered changes to Scheduler configuration including quiet hours and daily LLM call limits. They also debugged app freezes using 'sample MyMeeting -file ~/Desktop/mm-hang.txt' and managed tools like sourcekit-lsp and claude with permission bypasses.

events.title: Retrain speaker profiles and fix UI in MyMeeting
events.summary: The user retrained speaker profiles using recordings from 'enrollByRecording' and 'enrollByFile', with updates to SpeakerRepository and TranscriptRepository. They fixed UI issues in TimelineSidebar.swift and ConnectionsView.swift, including a non-responsive 'cron job history' button and hit-test area limitations, and adjusted divider opacity for light mode compatibility.

events.title: Improve writing capture and text processing
events.summary: The user debugged and fixed a writing capture issue in 'writing-capture-researcher' where the placeholder 'Write message..' was incorrectly captured as user input. The fix involved checking 'isPastedValue' and 'realChars' in WritingCaptureWorker.swift, and ensuring only user-added text was recorded, not deletions from baseline. The session also addressed the fragment '你得抓住mei' and handled OCR data integrity.

events.title: Optimize VAD and transcription models
events.summary: The user replaced FluidAudio's VadManager with a new Silero VAD setup using ONNX silero_vad.onnx (v5), maintaining LSTM state and a 64-sample context window to improve speech/music segmentation. They tested the model on 'Personal ai meeting 1.m4a' and ensured real-time updates for speaker training and meeting details.

events.title: Deploy and manage code with Git and tools
events.summary: The user committed and deployed changes across multiple sessions using git add, commit, and push operations, including handling 'dangerously-skip-permissions' for tools like claude and sourcekit-lsp. They managed project files in MyMeeting and MyPortrait, including Xcode rebuilds, and addressed issues like 'Crunch for 58s' and '3m 25s cooking time'.

events.title: Analyze Rewind AI failure & data distillation
events.summary: The user analyzed the failure reasons of Rewind AI, focusing on longitudinal data collection over 10 years as a superior method to interviews for capturing authentic self-data. They discussed technical challenges including audio error handling (AudioError 6), debugging the audio processing pipeline, and the philosophical distinction between capturing a 'snapshot' versus a 'movie' of personal evolution. The session referenced specific projects like 'My Meeting' and 'My Portrait', software versions (v1.1187.4, Opus 4.8 High), and time points (20岁, 25岁, 30岁) to track personal development.

events.title: Debug UI freeze in My-Meeting
events.summary: The user diagnosed a UI freeze in My-Meeting caused by main thread blockage during speaker re-identification, suspecting synchronous audio decoding in AudioPlayerModel.load. They used 'sample MyMeeting -file ~/Desktop/mm-hang.txt' to capture thread stacks and analyzed ONNX/FluidAudio inference and FluidAudio manager state as root causes.

events.title: Fix layout lag in My-Portrait
events.summary: The user resolved UI freezes in My-Portrait caused by ScrollView+LazyVStack’s O(N) layout performance, replacing it with List for true virtualization. They confirmed the fix reduced rendering time and eliminated lag during speaker re-identification in long meetings, referencing commits like 'ef74bdd' and files such as 'WritingCaptureWorker.swift'.

events.title: Fix placeholder text misclassification
events.summary: The user fixed a data loss issue in My-Portrait where placeholder text ('Write message.') was incorrectly captured as user input due to flawed 'isPastedValue' logic. They modified 'WritingCaptureWorker.swift' to detect and block placeholder patterns, recovering lost messages and validating with real data from IDs 2038 and 1132.

events.title: Refine input handling for multilingual support
events.summary: The user focused on improving input method handling for multilingual support in MyPortrait, addressing challenges with CJK languages, fast typing, and avoiding input method switches. They discussed using a dual-input method, collecting keystroke data, and fine-tuning a small model with data including 'hen bu xi' and '100%不想切换输入法'. Technical work involved 'WritingCapturePrompts.swift', 'canvas_fusion', and 'sabledProviders: Set<String>'.

events.title: Rearchitect canvas pipeline with keystroke backbone
events.summary: The user redefined the canvas processing pipeline in Claude, establishing keystroke logs as the primary content skeleton and OCR as a correction layer for CJK character positioning and content landing. They emphasized enforcing 'no new content without keystroke evidence' to reduce hallucinations, referencing 'L3', 'frames', 'PasteboardMonitor', and 'v1.1T87.4'. The design included handling edit types like '追加编辑' and 'mid-edit' to optimize OCR use.

events.title: Deploy on-device ASR for meeting transcription
events.summary: The user conducted a session to deploy the Qwen3-ASR (1.7B, 8-bit) model on-device for real-time audio transcription in MyPortrait, supporting Chinese and English. They configured microphone capture, speaker identification with named clusters like 'Blair' and 'Joy', and set constraints like transcription only when plugged in and 0.1 GB memory usage. The session included testing model performance and managing audio queue state.

events.title: Debug crash in MyMeeting
events.summary: The user investigated a SIGTERM crash in the 'MyMeeting' project, focusing on 'libsiftCore.dylib' and memory addresses 0x199ab4010–0x199ab4030. They examined the 'main' file, 'swift_release' build config, and Thread 1's stack trace to diagnose the termination signal.

events.title: Implement PostHog analytics
events.summary: The user integrated PostHog analytics into the 'MyMeeting' app by configuring the API key and endpoint 'https://us.i.posthog.com' in 'AnalyticsService.swift'. They referenced 'AppConstants.bundleID' and used Xcode's navigator and debug bar to verify setup.

events.title: Port OCR and fix UI in My-Portrait
events.summary: The user ported an OCR implementation from a screenshot to Swift for the 'My-Portrait' app, focusing on 'RecordingManager.swift' and 'Audio/Recording/RecordingManager.swift'. They removed hardcoded separators in 'Divider()' and confirmed fixes via 'swift build' and testing in Light mode.

events.title: Audit video FPS and remove legacy setting
events.summary: The user investigated why 'videoFps' in 'ConfigSchema.swift' had no effect on screen capture or compression. They found it was unused in 'CaptureCoordinator' and 'CompactionWorker', concluding it was a legacy artifact from a fixed-FPS architecture and should be removed.

events.title: Evaluate SCK vs CoreAudio for audio capture
events.summary: The user compared ScreenCaptureKit (SCK) and CoreAudio tap for audio capture in 'My-Portrait', analyzing tradeoffs for Bluetooth stability and selective recording (e.g., Zoom/Teams). They reviewed 'MeetingManager.swift' and implemented dual-path logic for stability.

events.title: Fix message slicing in edit_log
events.summary: The user identified that the 'ax_cleaned' logic in 'portrait.sqlite' failed to slice messages properly, causing the longest message (ID 2497) to dominate the UI. They analyzed records 2497–2501 and considered fixing the slicing logic to align logs with individual messages.

events.title: Analyze Rewind AI failure and identity formation
events.summary: The user analyzed Rewind AI's failure to distill long-term records into model-usable signals, focusing on identifying 'identity formation events'. They discussed framing a person's evolution as a 'movie' rather than a snapshot, referencing 'Opus 4.8 High' and 'zz - Joy - Max'.

events.title: Manage audio and memory settings in My-Portrait
events.summary: The user adjusted audio backends, power modes, and memory settings in 'My-Portrait', including fixing 'SystemAudioService' and 'AppConstants.bundleID'. They also implemented persistent color fields in 'EventFolderStore.swift' and ensured colorHex persistence via user selection.

events.title: Debug writing capture logic
events.summary: The user debugged issues in the 'WritingCapturePass4Agent.swift' and 'WritingCapturePass4Builders.swift' files, focusing on ensuring keystroke text is captured correctly and not conflated with pre-existing document content. They implemented a rule to validate input by comparing actual keystroke text with generated output, addressing a bug where 342 keystrokes for 3115 characters were incorrectly attributed to user input. The fix involved grouping message totals and adjusting logic in Pass4 to prevent editing of pre-existing documents from being recorded.

events.title: Fix AX and OCR routing in My-Portrait
events.summary: The user resolved a core routing bug in 'My-Portrait' where a canvas element from Spotify was misclassified as keystrokes due to a missing filter in the keystroke gate (confidence 0.8). They traced the issue to a routing mistake in the AX (Accessibility) event pipeline and fixed it by adjusting the 'isAxBroken' logic and validating canvas output before processing. The fix was tested with 'caffeinate' and '--dangerously-skip-permissions' to bypass permission checks during debugging.

events.title: Refactor MeetingTemplate to RecordingTemplate
events.summary: The user renamed the 'MeetingTemplate' struct to 'RecordingTemplate' across multiple files including 'Models/RecordingTemplate.swift' and 'Persistence/MeetingTemplateRepository.swift', resolving a naming conflict and updating database migrations. They also addressed GRDB and Codable integration issues, and investigated a commit (ba5ac69) related to fixing an AX routing issue. The change was part of a broader effort to improve template reuse and avoid confusion in audio recording workflows.

events.title: Implement speaker separation in My-Meeting
events.summary: The user worked on integrating speaker separation using FluidAudio, completing speaker renaming with retroactive name application and partially implementing true name recognition. They emphasized the need for real-device testing and outlined future steps for cross-meeting voice matching. The feature was tested in Obsidian, with a focus on validating speaker identification in actual meeting contexts.

events.title: Configure transcription models and audio pipelines
events.summary: The user configured and tested multiple transcription models including 'openai_whisper-large-v3', 'parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3', and 'Qwen3-ASR (1.7B, 8-bit)', while addressing issues with audio device settings and VAD (Voice Activity Detection). The fix was part of a broader effort to clean up legacy UI components and improve clarity in the recording pipeline.

events.title: Fix message extraction at event boundaries
events.summary: The user implemented and tested a fix for lost messages across event boundaries in the 'My-Portrait' app, modifying 'WritingCaptureWorker.swift' to enhance 'bestGroupText' logic and add 'boundary sending' to recover incomplete messages like 1153 and 1154. The fix was committed as 6143423 and validated across test ranges [1150-1154] and [1127-1134], resolving fragmentation caused by event resets and placeholder handling.

events.title: Resolve audio chunk stuck in pending state
events.summary: The user diagnosed and fixed an issue where audio chunk 3402 remained stuck in 'pending' due to `AssetPath.resolve` returning nil for missing files, causing silent filtering via `compactMap`. The fix modified `PortraitDBImpl.swift` to prevent silent filtering and allow the chunk to reach `transcribeOne`, where it would be marked as 'done' when the file was unreadable. The fix was committed as 970be0f and confirmed via Xcode rebuild and test runs.

events.title: Implement unified message extraction model
events.summary: The user planned and began implementing a unified model to replace multiple overlapping heuristics (e.g., 'baseline-skip', 'bestGroupText', 'extractSentMessages') in the message extraction pipeline. The new model, based on field state timelines, aims to consolidate six patches into three orthogonal stages: reset state detection, timeline scanning, and keystroke filtering. The user created regression test fixtures and outlined a roadmap to simplify and stabilize the writing-capture system.

events.title: Fix UI rendering of colored dots in SwiftUI
events.summary: The user resolved a UI issue in 'MemoriesView.swift' where colored dots (e.g., 'circle.fill') were not displaying correctly due to macOS rendering SF Symbols in grayscale. The fix involved replacing Label components with Image components using `.foregroundStyle` and `.renderingMode(.original)` to preserve true color. The change was committed as 25427ae and verified in Xcode.

events.title: Debug timeline sync and false send events

They verified results via SQLite queries on 'edit_log' and 'typing_events', tested with '--dangerously-skip-permissions', and evaluated AI providers including Claude, Groq, and OpenAI, confirming 100% context usage and timing effectiveness at 200ms and 5ms intervals.

events.title: Debug IME behavior in Electron and web apps
events.summary: The user investigated IME input capture limitations across Electron apps (e.g., claudefordesktop) and web apps (e.g., Safari/ChatGPT), finding that only Electron apps captured actual 汉字, while web apps only captured pinyin due to AX restrictions. They explored headless IME conversion using 'librime' and system APIs, concluding that embedding 'librime' into a custom process was viable but unstable, and confirmed the primary input method as system-built-in pinyin.

events.title: Process OCR and generate Canvas docs
events.summary: The user executed the 'WritingCaptureCanvasAgent.run' in Obsidian 1.12.7, processing rawSessions and integrating OCR text via the OCR module. They applied Pass 2 with LLM-generated prompts and embeddings for 'route=ax', then completed Pass 3 to generate Canvas documents using 'ax_cleaned' and 'keystroke_count' metrics, with final output through 'canvas_fusion'.

events.title: Refine OCR and IME tail capture
events.summary: The user focused on improving text capture for CJK input, particularly handling IME tail residues and incomplete keystrokes in the 'WritingCapturePrompts.swift' and 'submitRaceBurst' functions. They addressed issues like truncated pinyin input, 'ji' and '信息都jL' cases, and implemented fixes via commits like '85876aa' and '405d3b0'. The work involved debugging with 'sourcekit-lsp', 'claude --dangerously-skip-permissions', and testing with phrases like '你说的对' and '我100%不想切换输入法'.

events.title: Test Librime input method with pinyin schemas
events.summary: The user tested the Librime input method engine using schemas like cangjie5, quick5, stroke, and terra_pinyin, validating API functionality via RimeContext, RimeCommit, and RimeMenu, and confirmed compatibility with macOS Terminal using caffeinate and --dangerously-skip-permissions to bypass permissions. They assessed accuracy for phrases like 'shoudaoqinghuifu' and evaluated Luna_pinyin vs. rime-ice for homophone resolution.

events.title: Integrate Librime with small LLM for context-aware input
events.summary: The user developed a fusion system combining Librime with a small language model (Haiku) to improve candidate selection accuracy, compiling C code (lattice.c) using librime_api.h and testing context-driven corrections for homophones like '会/回' and '他/她'. The approach achieved 94% accuracy with zero regressions and was validated using real-world test cases and the /tmp/rime-test directory.

events.title: Fix voice training state issue in My-Portrait
events.summary: The user resolved a '点 能重试' freeze in My-Portrait by fixing a state transition bug in VoiceTrainer.start() that blocked retries from a 'failure' state, adding a reset() call to ensure a clean start. They tested the fix using the phrase '你说的对' five times via Librime and confirmed the model learned usage of '的' beyond exact phrase memorization.

events.title: Implement input method detection and routing
events.summary: The user implemented real-time input method detection using NSTextInputContext and kTISNotifySelectedKeyboardInputSourceChanged, focusing on Apple's Shuangpin Simplified (5 layouts) and third-party internal modes. They referenced Apple documentation and confirmed that 90% of routing is determined by the input method skeleton, with lightweight handling for residual cases.

events.title: 绝区零与学习资源协作
events.summary: 用户在 WeChat 中持续与团队成员如王昱、Joy Zhang、Luciter 等协作，讨论绝区零 3.0 活动奖励、新品耳夹蓝牙礼盒及游戏策略。同时，用户分享了 School Calendar 25_26 v2.pdf 和 HC schedule.png 等学习日程文件，并交流机器学习与 Mac 游戏相关资源。
